info.DAtuviSezaH: 'sPurja' iti hrasva-ukAreRa-nirdeSe kfte api upaDAyAM ca 8.2.78 ityanena dIrGaH avaSyaM sidDyet  ataH mUlataH eva prayuktaH dIrGaH UkAraH vyarTaH vyarTa~ san upaDAyAM ca 8.2.78 ityasya anityatvaM jYApayati

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'astyevaM jaqaDAmatA ca Bavato yad vyomni visPUrjase' (kA0 pra0 10444)
'kva ca vikrAntatA yAtA kva ca visPUrjitaM mahat' (BA0 Salya0 3133) visPUrjitaM garjitam stanitam
'tatsarvaM suralokadevasadfSaM Darmasya visPUrjitam' (Bartf0 2125) visPUrjitam PalaM vipAkaH pariRAmaH
'DArARAM ca nipAtena vAyorvisPUrjitena ca' (BA0 vana0 1866) visPUrjitena pracaRqena vegena
'viSvaM viDvaMsayan vIryaSOryavisPUrjitaBruvA' (BA0 pu0 42457) visPUrjitA''kuYcitA anyatra durlaBorTaH
